data.title: U.S. Air Force Plans Restructuring of Sentinel Missile System by Year-End
data.description: The U.S. Air Force has announced its intention to finalize a restructuring plan for the Sentinel intercontinental ballistic missile system by the end of the year. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the program, developed by Northrop Grumman, has faced significant challenges, including escalating costs and delays in deployment. The projected cost of the program is $141 billion, and the restructuring aims to address these issues to ensure the system's timely and efficient implementation.

data.title: Pasqal Seeks €200 Million Funding to Reach Unicorn Status
data.description: French quantum computing startup Pasqal is reportedly in discussions to secure €200 million in funding, which would value the company at over €1 billion before the investment. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the situation. This funding round could elevate Pasqal to unicorn status, reflecting the growing interest and investment in quantum technology. The company is aiming to leverage this capital to expand its operations and enhance its technological capabilities. The move underscores the increasing momentum in the quantum computing sector as companies strive to advance their technological frontiers.

data.title: Saks Global Enterprises Seeks to Prevent Closure of Key Locations
data.description: Bankrupt luxury retailer Saks Global Enterprises is taking legal action to prevent Simon Property Group from shutting down two of its stores located in California and New York. Bloomberg posted on X that the retailer is striving to maintain operations at these sites despite its financial difficulties. Saks Global Enterprises, which has been facing bankruptcy challenges, argues that the closures would significantly impact its business strategy and customer base. The company is seeking a court order to halt the planned closures, emphasizing the importance of these locations to its overall operations. Saks Global Enterprises continues to navigate its bankruptcy proceedings while attempting to preserve its presence in key markets.

data.title: Grayscale Evaluates Digital Assets for Sustainable Networks
data.description: Grayscale is conducting evaluations of numerous digital assets to identify networks that demonstrate genuine activity, robust fundamentals, and long-term sustainability. Grayscale posted on X. The company aims to pinpoint digital currencies that exhibit enduring value and potential for growth in the evolving cryptocurrency landscape. This initiative is part of Grayscale's broader strategy to ensure that its investment offerings are backed by assets with substantial and sustainable market presence.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 67,000 USDT with a 0.23% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2026, 14:49 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 67,000 USDT and is now trading at 66,800.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 0.23% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: World Bank President Ajay Banga Shares Key Advice with Daughters
data.description: World Bank President Ajay Banga has imparted significant advice to his daughters, emphasizing the importance of certain values. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Banga's focus on instilling principles that would guide them throughout their lives. Banga's insights reflect his leadership philosophy and the values he considers essential for personal and professional growth. His advice underscores the importance of resilience, integrity, and adaptability in navigating life's challenges. As a prominent figure in global finance, Banga's perspectives offer valuable lessons not only to his family but also to those seeking guidance in leadership and personal development.

data.title: Quantoz's Digital Currency Tokens Comply with European Regulations
data.description: Quantoz holds an electronic money institution license issued by the Dutch central bank. According to ChainCatcher, its digital currency tokens USDQ, EURQ, and EURD are governed by electronic money regulations within the European Economic Area. The reserve funds for these tokens are stored in special accounts under a bankruptcy-remote fund structure at a 1:1 ratio. Additionally, Quantoz is required to maintain at least a 2% reserve buffer on its balance sheet.

data.title: China's PBOC Implements New Regulations on Virtual Currency Risks
data.description: On February 6, 2026, China's People's Bank of China (PBOC), along with seven other agencies, introduced new regulations targeting risks associated with virtual currencies. According to NS3.AI, the framework generally prohibits the tokenization of real-world assets (RWAs) within China unless specifically approved, while imposing stringent compliance and disclosure requirements for offshore RWAs. The regulations also classify stablecoins as having properties similar to legal tender, which raises concerns about foreign exchange risks. Oversight of these regulations is divided among several Chinese regulatory bodies.

data.title: Quantum-Resistant Blockchain Firm qLABS Secures $100,000 Investment
data.description: HYLQ Strategy Corp has invested $100,000 to acquire 18.3 million qONE tokens from qLABS, a leader in quantum-resistant blockchain solutions on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, qLABS is focused on developing quantum-safe infrastructure, including the Quantum-Sig smart contract wallet and an L1 Migration Toolkit, to safeguard against potential quantum computing threats. The qONE token, which facilitates governance, staking, and access to quantum-safe features, has demonstrated bullish price momentum since its launch on Hyperliquid.

data.title: Canary Capital and Grayscale Launch Spot SUI ETFs
data.description: Canary Capital and Grayscale have simultaneously launched spot SUI ETFs, offering investors direct exposure to token prices and the ability to earn staking rewards. According to PANews, the Canary Stake SUI ETF is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker SUIS, tracking the spot price of SUI and providing net staking returns through SUI's proof-of-stake mechanism. Grayscale has converted its SUI Trust into an ETF, which is listed on NYSE Arca under the ticker GSUI.

data.title: Kazakhstan's Crude Diversion Leads to Production Decline
data.description: Kazakhstan experienced a significant decrease in crude oil production in January due to limited diversion capabilities. Bloomberg posted on X that the country managed to reroute only a small portion of the crude oil that could not be transported through the CPC pipeline to the Black Sea. This logistical challenge has impacted Kazakhstan's overall output, highlighting the importance of efficient transportation routes for maintaining production levels.

data.title: US stocks opened with mixed results for the crypto sector, with Coinbase (COIN) rising slightly by 0.13%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.11%, the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.18%, and the S&P 500 rose 0.13%. In the crypto sector, Coinbase rose 0.13%; while Strategy (MSTR) fell 1.11%, Solana fell 0.99%, Bitmine fell 0.79%, SharpLink fell 0.60%, and Circle fell 0.19%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Moderna Stock Rises 6.6% as FDA Begins Review of Flu Vaccine
data.description: Moderna's stock experienced a 6.6% increase following the announcement that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has initiated a review of the company's flu vaccine. According to Jin10, this development marks a significant step for Moderna as it seeks to expand its vaccine portfolio beyond COVID-19. The FDA's review process is crucial for Moderna's efforts to bring its flu vaccine to market, potentially enhancing its position in the pharmaceutical industry. Investors are closely monitoring the situation, anticipating the potential impact on Moderna's future growth and market share.

data.title: MYX Secures Strategic Funding Led by Consensys
data.description:
MYX, an on-chain derivatives protocol, has announced the completion of a strategic funding round led by Consensys. According to ChainCatcher, Consensys Mesh and Systemic Ventures also participated in the investment. Following this round, Consensys has become the largest investor in MYX. The funds will be used to support the release of MYX V2 and the deployment of a modular derivatives settlement engine.

MYX V2 represents a shift from a vertically integrated decentralized application (DApp) to a modular settlement layer, allowing other products and platforms to build on it. This design aims to prevent the fragmentation of derivatives liquidity across chains and promote the evolution of the industry from isolated decentralized exchanges (DEX) to shared clearing and settlement primitives. At the protocol level, MYX V2 integrates account abstraction based on EIP-4337 and EIP-7702, combined with Chainlink's latest permissionless oracle stack, addressing long-standing issues such as slow onboarding of long-tail assets, low capital efficiency, and complex trading processes.

data.title: Bitcoin Profit Realization Ratio Declines, Market Remains Stable
data.description: On February 18, Glassnode shared insights on social media regarding Bitcoin's market dynamics. According to BlockBeats, the realized profit-to-market capitalization ratio, measured by a 30-day moving average, has significantly decreased, absorbing much of the previous profit-taking activities. Despite this decline, the indicator remains above the historical 'panic selling' range. This suggests that while profit-taking behavior in the market is cooling down, it has not yet reached a widespread capitulation phase.

data.title: Prices of many traditional financial assets rebounded, with silver and crude oil rising across the board.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,939.4 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.33%; silver prices rose to $76.99 per ounce, a daily increase of 3.73%. Regarding volatility indices, the BVIX (BTC volatility index) is currently at 51.87, down 1.67% on the day; the EVIX (ETH volatility index) is currently at 68.46, down 1.51% on the day. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 1.62% to $63.80 per barrel; Brent crude oil rose 2.00% to $69.21 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop service covering precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Web 4.0 Manifesto Introduces Autonomous AI Agents in Crypto
data.description: Sigil Wen, a Thiel Fellow, has released a manifesto outlining the concept of Web 4.0, where AI agents independently perform tasks such as reading, writing, owning, earning, and transacting using cryptocurrency without human intervention. According to NS3.AI, Wen has developed infrastructure and AI agents, including Conway and Automaton, which autonomously manage wallets, pay for computational resources, and replicate if they prove profitable, all based on a natural selection model. This emerging machine economy utilizes stablecoins and decentralized technology, marking a significant advancement in crypto infrastructure amid the ongoing bear market.

data.title: Macron Criticizes Social Media Platforms' Free Speech Defense
data.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has criticized the free speech defense often used by social media platforms, describing it as 'pure bullshit.' Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Macron's remarks as a challenge to a significant foreign policy objective of U.S. President Donald Trump. Macron's comments reflect ongoing global debates about the role and responsibility of social media companies in regulating content and ensuring user safety. The French leader's stance underscores the tension between advocating for free expression and addressing the potential harms of unregulated online speech.

data.title: Aptos and Solana Lead Decline in CoinDesk 20 Index
data.description: Aptos (APT) experienced a 3% decline, leading the CoinDesk 20 Index lower. According to Bitalk News, Solana (SOL) also showed poor performance, dropping 2.5% since Tuesday. The CoinDesk 20 is currently trading at 1962.18 points, marking a 0.9% decrease from Tuesday.

data.title: Brevan Howard crypto fund posts 30% loss in 2025, worst year since launch: FT
data.description:
Brevan Howard’s BH Digital Asset fund fell 29. 5% in 2025, its worst performance since the crypto-focused fund's 2021 launch.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/390314/brevan-howard-crypto-fund-posts-30-loss-in-2025-worst-year-since-launch-ft?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
